evals.prompt: I need CT fingerprint search for SHA-256 fingerprint 9a7b112233445566778899aabbccddeeff00123456789abcdef0112233445566.
evals.expected_output: Use the ct-fingerprint-search skill for this ct fingerprint search request and produce the documented result for SHA-256 fingerprint 9a7b112233445566778899aabbccddeeff00123456789abcdef0112233445566.
expectations: Selects ct-fingerprint-search for requests matching its trigger description.
Uses the documented tool surface: cert_search_ct_fingerprint.
Keeps the response focused on searching Certificate Transparency logs by SHA-256 certificate fingerprint.

evals.prompt: Handle a focused ct fingerprint search workflow for SHA-256 fingerprint 9a7b112233445566778899aabbccddeeff00123456789abcdef0112233445566; do not switch to a broader certificate audit unless it is required.
evals.expected_output: Use the ct-fingerprint-search skill and avoid substituting adjacent skills when the user asks for this focused workflow.
expectations: Selects ct-fingerprint-search instead of a generic certificate or TLS skill.
Avoids unrelated scanning, generation, or remediation steps unless requested.
